rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Elec. Code §253.158, which governs treatment of campaign contributions by spouses and children. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: For purposes of this subchapter, a contribution by the spouse of an individual is not considered to be a contribution by the individual.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns election campaign contributions, proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption.
